title: Create CC:T
description: Create, ComputerCraft: Tweaked And Some Other Mods!
body:
<!-- PNG version -->
[![Modrinth-Gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-cct/gallery)[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/5CA8sewarU)
[![paypal-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-plural_64h.png)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/MystixMew)

### **Some Mods That Create CC:T Includes**
> [Create CC: T](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-cct) Includes mods such as [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric 'Create: Fabric'), [ComputerCraft: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked 'CC: Tweaked'), "ComputerCraft: Create Bridge", "CTOV + CTOV Addons", "Farmer's Delight", "Xaeros Minimap & Worldmap", and lots more mods so you as the player can do more exploring and stuff without getting bored.

### About Create CC:T

> [Create CC:T](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-cct) is a big collection of mods designed to enhance your experience with the Create Mod on Fabric and this mod pack adds select mods to provide a better experience, The main attraction of this mod pack is that we have [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric 'Create: Fabric') this pack also includes [ComputerCraft: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked 'CC: Tweaked'), the thing so interesting with both of these mods is that there is a mod that allows them both to work together. 

### What makes [Create CC:T](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-cct) unique?

> [Create CC:T](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-cct) doesn't just have [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric 'Create: Fabric') and [ComputerCraft: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked 'CC: Tweaked'), With lots more mods to improve your experience, make the game a bit harder than usual, and provide a little twist.
